info.name: OpenCatalogi - DCAT National Portal Federation (DONL/HVD/theme)
info.description:
API-only contract tests for the national/EU open-data federation (dcat-national-portal-federation change, DCAT-NPF-001..003). Asserts the instance-level DONL source metadata on GET /api/dcat, HVD triples on an HVD-declared publication, controlled data-theme binding (bind-or-omit), and the admin 'Validate for data.overheid.nl' report. Per the Playwright-UI-only / Newman-API convention this backend surface is asserted here.

Variables:
- baseUrl (default http://localhost:8080)
- catalogSlug: a DCAT-enabled catalog slug
- hvdPublicationId / hvdCatalogSlug: a catalog+publication with an HVD category declared
- adminAuth: Basic auth for the DONL validate action

item.name: DCAT-NPF-001 Instance document carries DONL source metadata

exec: pm.test('instance catalog node present', () => root !== undefined);
// publisher + contactPoint depend on configuration; assert shape when present.
if (root['dct:publisher']) pm.test('publisher is a foaf:Agent', () => root['dct:publisher']['@type'] === 'foaf:Agent');

item.name: DCAT-NPF-002/003 Catalog datasets: HVD triples + controlled theme (no literal)

exec: // Any HVD category emitted MUST be an authority URI + carry applicableLegislation.
pm.test('hvdCategory is a bna authority URI', () => JSON.stringify(d['dcatap:hvdCategory']).includes('data.europa.eu/bna/c_'));
// Any theme emitted MUST be an authority URI object, never a bare string literal.
pm.test('dcat:theme is an @id authority ref, not a literal', () => typeof d['dcat:theme'] === 'object' && d['dcat:theme']['@id'] !== undefined);
pm.test('report has the harvest-source URL', () => typeof doc.sourceUrl === 'string' && doc.sourceUrl.endsWith('/api/dcat'));
pm.test('report has valid flag + violations array', () => typeof doc.valid === 'boolean' && Array.isArray(doc.violations));
